text: <caption><image_0>The image shows a man and a woman standing in front of a carnival ride at night. The man is on the left side of the image, wearing a blue plaid shirt and has a beard. He is looking at the camera with a slight smile on his face. The woman is standing next to him, smiling at him. She has long blonde hair and is wearing a gray sweatshirt with the word "Capella" written on it. In the background, there are other people and carnival rides with pink and purple lights. The sky is dark, suggesting that it is nighttime.</caption>
